response.original_title: [FAQ~AA]How to speak directly at American Representative fast?
response.overview: [FAQ~AA]How to speak directly at American Representative fast?  For the fastest and most direct communication with your representative, ＋𝟣－８５５－７１６－３２８２(USA) call the US Capitol Switchboard at＋𝟣－８５５－７１６－３２８２(USA) and ask to be connected to your representative's office. A telephone call is a widely used and effective method ＋𝟣－８５５－７１６－３２８２ (USA)  especially for time-sensitive issues like an upcoming vote.
